Title: Verify Initial Vehicle Configuration
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device, internet connection available
Test Data: Vehicle manufacturer (e.g., Toyota), model (e.g., Corolla), year (e.g., 2020), fuel type (e.g., Petrol), environmental preference (e.g., Yes)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time after installation.
2. Select the vehicle manufacturer from the dropdown list.
3. Select the vehicle model from the dropdown list.
4. Enter the vehicle year.
5. Select the fuel type from the available options.
6. Indicate preference for minimizing environmental impact (Yes/No).
Expected Result: Vehicle details are saved and used for subsequent distributor recommendations.

Title: Verify Custom Vehicle Configuration
Preconditions: Application installed on Android device, internet connection available
Test Data: Custom vehicle manufacturer (e.g., Tesla), model (e.g., Model 3), year (e.g., 2022), fuel type (e.g., Electric), consumption (e.g., 15 kWh/100km)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time after installation.
2. Enter the custom vehicle manufacturer.
3. Enter the custom vehicle model.
4. Enter the vehicle year.
5. Select the fuel type from the available options.
6. Enter the custom consumption value.
Expected Result: Custom vehicle details are saved and used for subsequent distributor recommendations.

Title: Verify distributor list display with default sorting
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed
Test Steps:
1. Open the application after completing initial configuration.
2. Navigate to the distributor list page.
Expected Result: The list of distributors is displayed with default sorting parameters.

Title: Verify distributor list display with custom sorting
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed
Test Data: User selects "maximize savings" as sorting preference
Test Steps:
1. Open the application after completing initial configuration.
2. Navigate to the distributor list page.
3. Select the sorting option "maximize savings" from the available parameters.
Expected Result: The list of distributors is displayed sorted according to the selected preference.

Title: Verify external navigation launch from distributor list
Preconditions: Device connected to internet, navigation app installed, distributor list displayed
Test Data: A distributor selected from the list
Test Steps:
1. Select a distributor from the list.
2. Confirm the selection to trigger navigation.
Expected Result: The external navigation app opens and displays the route to the selected distributor.

Title: Verify statistics display after initial configuration
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the statistics page from the navigation bar.
Expected Result: The user’s statistics related to distributor choices are displayed on screen.

Title: Verify modification of statistics via menu
Preconditions: User has made a recorded expense in the app
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the statistics page.
2. Open the menu and select the "modify statistics" option.
3. Enter new data in the provided interface.
4. Confirm the changes.
Expected Result: The updated statistics are displayed on screen.

Title: Verify reset of statistics
Preconditions: User has generated statistics
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the statistics page.
2. Open the menu and select the "reset statistics" option.
3. Confirm the reset action.
Expected Result: The statistics page displays no usage data.

Title: Verify access to settings page
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the settings page from the navigation bar.
Expected Result: The list of modifiable settings is displayed on screen.

Title: Verify vehicle list display and modification
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page.
2. Click the button to modify the vehicle list.
3. Select an existing vehicle from the list.
Expected Result: The selected vehicle details are displayed for modification.

Title: Verify prevention of deleting all vehicles
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed, at least one vehicle saved
Test Data: User attempts to delete the only saved vehicle
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page.
2. Click the button to modify the vehicle list.
3. Attempt to delete the only saved vehicle.
Expected Result: The deletion action is blocked, and an error message is displayed (if applicable).

Title: Verify addition of a new vehicle
Preconditions: Initial configuration completed
Test Data: User inputs details for a new vehicle
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page.
2. Click the button to modify the vehicle list.
3. Select the option to add a new vehicle.
4. Enter the vehicle details.
5. Confirm the addition.
Expected Result: The new vehicle is added to the list and saved.

Title: View Statistics Page
Preconditions: User is logged in to the application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the statistics section of the application.
2. Verify the page loads successfully.
Expected Result: The user sees their consumption statistics related to previously selected distributors.

Title: Modify Statistics
Preconditions: User is logged in and has existing consumption statistics
Test Data: Updated consumption data (e.g., new fuel amount, date)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the statistics page.
2. Select the option to modify statistics.
3. Enter updated consumption data.
4. Confirm the changes.
Expected Result: The updated consumption data is saved and reflected in the statistics.

Title: Reset Statistics
Preconditions: User is logged in and has existing consumption statistics
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the statistics page.
2. Select the option to reset statistics.
3. Confirm the reset action.
Expected Result: All previously recorded consumption data is cleared, and the statistics are reset to default values.

Title: Access Settings Page
Preconditions: User is logged in to the application
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the settings section of the application.
Expected Result: The settings page loads, displaying all modifiable settings.

Title: View, Modify, or Delete Existing Vehicle
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one vehicle in the list
Test Data: Existing vehicle details (e.g., name, model, fuel type)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the vehicle management section.
2. Select an existing vehicle from the list.
3. Modify vehicle details (e.g., name, fuel type).
4. Save changes.
Expected Result: The vehicle details are updated successfully in the list.

Title: Add New Vehicle
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: New vehicle details (e.g., name, model, fuel type)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the vehicle management section.
2. Select the option to add a new vehicle.
3. Enter vehicle details.
4. Save the new vehicle.
Expected Result: The new vehicle is added to the list and appears in the vehicle management section.

Title: Delete Vehicle
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one vehicle in the list
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the vehicle management section.
2. Select the vehicle to delete.
3. Confirm deletion.
Expected Result: The selected vehicle is removed from the list.

Title: Verify Correct Installation
Preconditions: None
Test Steps: 1. Download and install the application on a device.
Expected Result: The application installs correctly without errors and is accessible from the device’s app list.

Title: Verify Data Removal on Uninstall
Preconditions: Application is installed and user data exists
Test Steps: 1. Uninstall the application from the device.
Expected Result: All application data is removed from the device, and no residual data related to the app remains.

Title: Handle Google Maps Service Unavailability
Preconditions: Application is running, Google Maps service is temporarily unavailable
Test Steps:
1. Simulate unavailability of Google Maps service.
2. Attempt to use a feature requiring Google Maps (e.g., location-based distributor search).
Expected Result: The application notifies the user about the unavailability of the Google Maps service and prevents crashes or errors.

Title: Verify Fuel Price Data Update
Preconditions: Application is connected to the internet
Test Data: Updated fuel price dataset from government source
Test Steps:
1. Wait for the scheduled update time or manually trigger an update.
2. Verify the application fetches the latest fuel price data.
Expected Result: The application successfully updates fuel price data and reflects the changes in relevant sections (e.g., distributor listings, statistics).

Title: Verify Android 8.1 Minimum Version Compatibility
Preconditions: App installation file is available.
Test Steps:
1. Install the app on a device/emulator running Android 8.1.
2. Launch the app.
3. Navigate through at least three primary screens (e.g., setup, distributor list, navigation).
Expected Result: App launches and functions without crashes or errors.

Title: Verify Response Time for Distributor Search
Preconditions: App is installed and configured with a vehicle.
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the distributor list screen.
2. Trigger a search for distributors within a 5 km radius.
3. Measure the time taken to load the distributor list.
Expected Result: Search completes within 4.20 seconds.

Title: Verify App Installation Size
Preconditions: None.
Test Data: Android device with 50 MB free storage.
Test Steps:
1. Download the app installation file.
2. Check the file size before installation.
3. Install the app on the device.
Expected Result: App installs successfully without storage errors; file size ≤ 50 MB.

Title: Verify Internet Dependency for Initial Setup
Preconditions: App is not yet configured.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app for the first time.
2. Attempt to configure vehicle type, fuel type, and search radius.
Expected Result: App blocks configuration and displays an error message: "Internet connection required for initial setup."

Title: Verify GPS Access for Distributor Location
Preconditions: App is configured but GPS is disabled.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app and navigate to the distributor list screen.
2. Attempt to load distributors.
Expected Result: App displays an error: "GPS access required to locate distributors" and prompts user to enable GPS.

Title: Verify Distributor List Based on GPS Location
Preconditions: App is configured; GPS is enabled.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app and navigate to the distributor list screen.
2. Verify the list shows distributors within the configured radius.
3. Manually change the device’s mock GPS location (e.g., via emulator).
4. Refresh the distributor list.
Expected Result: Distributor list updates to reflect new location-based results.

Title: Verify User Position Sharing with Google Services
Preconditions: App is configured; GPS is enabled.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app and navigate to the distributor list screen.
2. Check app permissions (Settings > Apps > [App Name] > Permissions).
Expected Result: App has "Location" permission enabled and shares user position with Google Maps API (as per GDPR-compliant disclosure).

Title: Verify Initial Configuration Screen Display
Preconditions: App is installed but not opened before.
Test Steps: 1. Launch the app for the first time.
Expected Result: App displays the configuration screen with fields for vehicle type, fuel type, search radius, and optimization parameters.

Title: Verify Vehicle Information Input
Preconditions: App is installed and launched.
Test Data: Valid vehicle details (e.g., type: "Sedan", fuel: "Diesel", year: "2015").
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to vehicle configuration (via setup or settings).
2. Enter vehicle details as specified.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Vehicle details are saved; app confirms submission (e.g., toast message: "Vehicle saved successfully").

Title: Verify Distributor List Display After Configuration
Preconditions: App is configured with vehicle and search parameters.
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the distributor list screen.
2. Verify the list is sorted by the selected optimization parameter (e.g., lowest cost).
Expected Result: Distributor list appears, sorted correctly, with no errors.

Title: Verify Error Handling for Intensive Usage
Preconditions: App is configured.
Test Steps:
1. Use the app intensively for 7 days (e.g., 10 searches/day).
2. Monitor for crashes, freezes, or usability issues.
Expected Result: No more than 4 critical errors (e.g., crashes, unresponsive screens) occur during the period.

Title: Navigation to Distributor via GaSmart
Preconditions: Application is configured; user has selected a distributor; navigation app is installed on the device.
Test Steps:
1. User selects a distributor from the list.
2. User confirms navigation to the selected distributor.
3. GaSmart processes the request and opens the navigation app.
Expected Result: GaSmart successfully opens the navigation app with the route from the user’s current location to the selected distributor.

Title: Display User Consumption Statistics
Preconditions: Application is configured.
Test Steps: 1. User taps the statistics icon on the main screen.
Expected Result: The application displays the statistics page showing the user’s consumption and spending data.

Title: Update User Statistics Manually
Preconditions: Application is configured.
Test Steps:
1. User requests to modify statistics.
2. Application displays the statistics modification screen.
3. User enters updated values and confirms changes.
Expected Result: The application updates the statistics with the new values.

Title: Reset User Statistics
Preconditions: Application is configured; user has existing statistics.
Test Steps:
1. User requests to reset statistics.
2. Application prompts for confirmation.
3. User confirms the reset.
Expected Result: The application resets all statistics to zero and recalculates from the reset moment.

Title: Display Application and Vehicle Settings
Preconditions: Application is configured.
Test Steps: 1. User taps the settings icon on the main screen.
Expected Result: The application displays the settings page showing configurable options for the app and the user’s vehicle.

Title: Modify Vehicle List
Preconditions: Application is configured.
Test Data: Existing vehicle list (e.g., ["Car1", "Car2"]), new vehicle to add ("Car3"), vehicle to remove ("Car2").
Test Steps:
1. User requests to modify the vehicle list.
2. Application displays the vehicle list modification screen.
3. User adds a new vehicle ("Car3") and removes an existing one ("Car2").
4. User confirms changes.
Expected Result: The application updates the vehicle list to reflect the added and removed vehicles.
